_doc: ONE generic, object-agnostic placement manifest (docs/OBJECT_PLACEMENT.md). One entry per object; the engine scripts/place_engine.py is the same for a hangar, church, tower, monument, or autogen box. footprint.source: 'osm' = match the model footprint to the painted building in the installed tCCRR.dds; 'static' = fixed OBJECT-GRID UTM E,N + ori (for monuments/towers/aircraft with no painted roof). For static, convert lat/lon: E,N=to_utm(lon,lat); oe,on=condor_grid.painted_texture_xy(E,N). front.model_groups = c3d object-name substrings defining the FRONT face (resolves the 180 ambiguity).

front._note: the +X facade (FRONT/DOORS groups) faces the airfield ~30deg NE; this resolves the 180. For a symmetric/autogen box, omit -> the 180 is irrelevant.

footprint._note: parked on the open apron ~33 m SE of the StenkovecHangar (NE side is tree line). Slovenia2 asset -> install-only, NOT git. Nudge E/N/ori from in-sim view.
Krstovar/Vodno peak monument. Terrain-mounted (no painted roof); z from DEM at this obj-grid point. lat=41.96370 lon=21.40980.
Macedonia Square fountain monument. lat=41.99591 lon=21.43147.
AEK / Vodno TV-telecom tower (height 155 m). lat=41.96552 lon=21.39765.
Triumphal arch Porta Macedonia. lat=41.99360 lon=21.43360.
Stone Bridge over the Vardar. lat=41.99710 lon=21.43323.

City Stadium / Nat. Arena. OSM-match unusable: model base ring is degenerate (1056 verts collapsed to a point at z-min, real 242x252 m footprint only above ~10 m), so place static at converted coords. lat=42.00571 lon=21.42556.

Kenzo Tange Transport Centre. OSM-match unreliable: model base (~320 m viaduct) >> OSM train_station polygon (3475 m2), registration drifted onto the rail yard (score 0.14). Place static at converted coords. lat=41.99096 lon=21.44589.
CC-BY Poly-by-Google radio tower stand-in on the Vodno ridge DEM summit (~997 m), NW of TelecomTowerAEK. 50 m tall.
CC-BY Poly-by-Google stadium stand-in placed on the Boris Trajkovski Sports Centre (real venue, 8972 m2) rather than duplicating the detailed ToseProeskiArena. 214x172 m.
CC0 Kenney skyscraper stand-in on a painted Karpos apartment block. 23.5 m base, 80 m tall.
CC0 Quaternius business building stand-in on a large painted Karpos block (6333 m2). 75x62 m base, 40 m tall.
